description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular electronic device with a blue upper casing and a white lower base. The top surface features a prominent red circular button, a small joystick, and several blue and white control buttons, as well as a speaker grille and a display screen showing colorful graphics. The side of the device includes multiple USB ports, an Ethernet port, and a micro-USB port, indicating connectivity and data transfer capabilities. The screen appears to be set into the top surface, surrounded by a black bezel, and displays a game or software interface. The overall design is reminiscent of a retro handheld gaming console or a custom arcade controller, with robust plastic construction. The device is small enough to be portable and is likely intended for tabletop or desktop use in urban environments.
description: A compact blue and white electronic device with a display screen, control buttons, ports, and a speaker grille, resembling a retro gaming console or arcade controller.
description_view_0: The device is seen from a low angle, highlighting the display screen, red button, joystick, and speaker grille, with a micro-USB port visible on the front edge.
description_view_1: This side view shows the USB and Ethernet ports, as well as the display screen and control buttons on the top surface.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the red button, white buttons, and the display screen, with minimal ports visible.
description_view_3: This side view displays three blue buttons on the edge, the display screen, and the speaker grille, with no visible ports.
